_meta._primarySource: Emirates Standards & Procedures - Concourse Layouts - October 2025
_secondarySources: Emirates Group Learning and Development - Dubai Airport Overview
Dubai Airports - New Departures Gate Guide (FINAL.pdf)
_meta._notes: Bay number != Gate number. Bay = ground operations identifier. Gate = passenger-facing identifier. Both should be searchable.

fieldDefinitions.bayId: Internal Emirates ground ops bay identifier
fieldDefinitions.oldGateId: Pre-renumbering gate label (where applicable, from FINAL.pdf)
fieldDefinitions.stand.duda: Dual Upper Deck Access. True = upper-deck bridge for A380
fieldDefinitions.stand.directBoarding: Passengers walk apron-side directly to aircraft
fieldDefinitions.bridges.totalCount: Total jetbridge count (NULL = not specified by source)

_sources: Wikipedia: Dubai International Airport (Terminal 1 / Concourse D section)
Dubai Airports airline directory (https://www.dubaiairports.ae/airlines)
bays._notes: T1 Concourse D serves 100+ non-Emirates international carriers. Public sources state 17 active gates within D1-D32 range and 2 A380 stands; per-gate breakdown is not publicly published. Bay==Gate identity used since internal ground-ops IDs aren't available publicly.

_sources: Wikipedia: Dubai International Airport (Terminal 2 / Concourse F section)
Lounge Pair: DXB Terminal 2 lounge and terminal guide
bays._notes: T2 boarding lounge — buses to a remote aircraft stand on Apron E. 12 lounges (F1-F12) feed ~43 remote stands; the per-stand identifiers are not publicly published. flydubai is the primary operator with 50+ regional/low-cost carriers also using T2.

_sources: IFATC OMDB gate database (https://ifatc.org/gates?code=OMDB) — community-sourced sim ATC reference
UAE GCAA AIP OMDB Aerodrome Chart (Apron G label confirmed in 2014 chart)
bays._notes: Apron G — east-side remote stand area between Concourse A's east apron and the Royal Airwing. Used for overnight parking, maintenance staging, charter, and overflow positions. Stand IDs G01-G22 sourced from IFATC's community sim database; Emirates internal ground-ops may use different bay numbers — verify against current S&P or Jeppesen 10-9 if available. Bus boarding only (no jetbridges).

bays._notes: Apron E remote aircraft position serving T2 boarding lounges F1-F12. These are the actual stands where T2 aircraft park; passengers reach them via bus from one of the F-numbered boarding lounges. IFATC documents E04-E13 (10 stands), but Wikipedia states ~43 remote stands feed F1-F12 in total — significant coverage gap remains.
